text: A dirt covered floor in a home kitchen.
A woman holding a tennis racquet on a court.
A rusted out graffiti covered train parked next to a red building.
Items in the basket on the fork of a bicycle.
Cheese oozing out of a grilled cheese sandwich
A young man doing tricks on a skateboard using a bench
A group of teddy bears lay in a basket.
A fridge full of variously colored glass bottles
two giraffes looking at the camera and some pink flowers
A bottle of red wine sits on a table with glasses of red wine and a partially eaten pizza.
